Grower and winery participants exchange visits, guidance, crop and maturity reports, restrictions, schedules, and acknowledgements against the active relationship.

decision_results.rationale: Selected the canonical DEC-084 outcome that best preserves the transition into aligned with attributable evidence.

events.reason: The manager verifies field scope and actuals before closure data flows to progress, payroll, compliance, and cost records.
Finance reconciles the receipt, parts, service, labor, and resource use with purchasing and work-cost records.
The relationship owner confirms that seasonal reporting, delivery, quality, and agreed obligations are fulfilled or explicitly excepted.
Finance and grower-relations reconcile delivery, commercial adjustment, dispute, and settlement history across both organizations.
The completed relationship version becomes historical while renewal, amendment, suspension, or ending creates a separately attributable successor state.
The coordinator schedules a qualified crew or contractor against block work, timing, safety, and labor demand.

decision_results.rationale: Selected the canonical DEC-061 outcome that best preserves the transition into crew_scheduled with attributable evidence.

events.reason: Grower, organization, vineyard, block, contract, spray, certification, and quality information is assembled without assuming identifiers already agree.

decision_results.rationale: Selected the canonical DEC-081 outcome that best preserves the transition into identity_matching with attributable evidence.

events.reason: The compliance coordinator maps the active standard and vintage to each site, block, activity, contractor, and buyer relationship.

decision_results.rationale: Selected the canonical DEC-091 outcome that best preserves the transition into requirements_mapped with attributable evidence.

events.reason: The foreman confirms the roster, qualification, instructions, and safety briefing before work begins.
The foreman records attendance, task changes, breaks, quantities, and attributable work as the crew executes.

decision_results.rationale: Selected the canonical DEC-062 outcome that best preserves the transition into working with attributable evidence.

events.reason: The foreman submits time, piece-rate units, task quantities, block allocation, and unresolved exceptions.
The manager verifies that time, units, task progress, and assignment history form a credible submission.

decision_results.rationale: Selected the canonical DEC-063 outcome that best preserves the transition into supervisor_verified with attributable evidence.

events.reason: Evidence owners are assigned to collect ordinary operational records, plans, training, separation, cleaning, transport, input, and annual measurement evidence.
Payroll accepts the verified labor record or opens an attributable correction instead of overwriting the submitted values.

decision_results.rationale: Selected the canonical DEC-064 outcome that best preserves the transition into payroll_accepted with attributable evidence.

events.reason: Finance allocates accepted labor and activity quantities to block, task, payroll, and management cost records.
The coordinator checks completeness, attribution, applicability, and internal consistency before preparing the package.

decision_results.rationale: Selected the canonical DEC-092 outcome that best preserves the transition into package_prepared with attributable evidence.

events.reason: The vineyard manager attests to the prepared package and authorizes submission without replacing independent audit authority.
The auditor reviews submitted and observed evidence against the identified standard and records compliant, evidence-needed, or noncompliant findings.

decision_results.rationale: Selected the canonical DEC-093 outcome that best preserves the transition into under_review with attributable evidence.

events.reason: The auditor records a compliant result when ordinary submitted and observed evidence satisfies the applicable standard.

decision_results.rationale: Selected the canonical DEC-093 outcome that best preserves the transition into compliant with attributable evidence.

events.reason: The certifier issues the certification decision for the compliant review without implying corrective action occurred.
The completed certification cycle remains immutable and is archived when a new standard vintage or annual cycle becomes current.
Grower-relations and compliance verify stable identity mappings, required history, contacts, and onboarding evidence.

decision_results.rationale: Selected the canonical DEC-082 outcome that best preserves the transition into due_diligence with attributable evidence.

events.reason: The accountable parties record accepted authority, quality, notice, delivery, adjustment, dispute, and payment terms.

decision_results.rationale: Selected the canonical DEC-083 outcome that best preserves the transition into active with attributable evidence.

events.reason: Grower and winery participants exchange visits, guidance, crop and maturity reports, restrictions, schedules, and acknowledgements against the active relationship.

decision_results.rationale: Selected the canonical DEC-084 outcome that best preserves the transition into aligned with attributable evidence.

events.reason: The relationship owner confirms that seasonal reporting, delivery, quality, and agreed obligations are fulfilled or explicitly excepted.
Finance and grower-relations reconcile delivery, commercial adjustment, dispute, and settlement history across both organizations.
The completed relationship version becomes historical while renewal, amendment, suspension, or ending creates a separately attributable successor state.
